details.pattern: Fix-A: New DialogCommandPalette component using useFilteredList, useCommand, useDialog, useLanguage. 84 lines. Fuzzy search via fuzzysort, keyboard nav via solid-list, categorized display, i18n support.
Fix-B: showPalette() now dynamically imports dialog-command-palette with .catch() error handling. Replaced run("file.open", "palette") with async import + dialog.show()
Fix-C: Added 2 i18n keys: command.palette.search.placeholder and command.palette.empty
